description.name: Honeysuckle Cottage
description.headline: Stone cottage with a wood fire near Hay-on-Wye
description.description: A snug two-bedroom stone cottage on the edge of the Black Mountains, ten minutes from the bookshops of Hay-on-Wye. Curl up by the wood-burning fireplace after a day of walking, or take breakfast in the enclosed garden. Dogs are welcome.

reviews: A proper countryside retreat. The fire was wonderful in the evenings and our dog loved the garden. Very peaceful.

policies.payment_schedule: Full payment due 14 days before arrival.
